title: Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions
essential_question: How can you find part of a group using unit fractions?
strategies: divide the total by the denominator to find 1 unit fraction of the group

learn.title: Finding a Unit Fraction of a Group
learn.content: To find a unit fraction of a group, divide the total number of items by the denominator. Example: 1/3 of 12 → 12 ÷ 3 = 4.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Using Equal Groups
learn.content: Think of dividing items into equal groups. 1/4 of 20 means: make 4 equal groups from 20. Each group has 20 ÷ 4 = 5 items. One group is 1/4 of the total.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Connection to Division
learn.content: Finding a unit fraction of a number is the same as division. 1/2 of 10 = 10 ÷ 2 = 5. 1/6 of 18 = 18 ÷ 6 = 3.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 1/b of N = N ÷ b — 핵심 공식
learn.content: 그룹의 단위분수 1/b만큼은 전체 N을 b로 나눈 값.   1/2 of 12 = 12 ÷ 2 = 6   1/3 of 15 = 15 ÷ 3 = 5   1/4 of 20 = 20 ÷ 4 = 5 🔍 핵심: 분수 of 그룹 = 나눗셈.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 곱셈으로 검산 — 답 × b = N
learn.content: 1/b of N의 답을 b번 모으면 다시 전체 N이 되어야 함.   1/3 of 15 = 5 → 5 × 3 = 15 ✓   1/4 of 20 = 5 → 5 × 4 = 20 ✓ 🔍 검산 단계: 답을 분모로 곱했을 때 원래 N과 같은가?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 일부 찾기 3단계 루틴
learn.content: 1/b of N 풀이 3단계:   단계 1) 전체 N과 분모 b 확인.   단계 2) N ÷ b 계산.   단계 3) 답을 단위와 함께 적기 (예: 5 학생). 예: 24 사탕의 1/4 → 1) N=24, b=4 → 2) 24÷4=6 → 3) 6 사탕.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분모 작을수록 더 큰 부분
learn.content: 같은 N에서 분모가 작을수록 한 부분이 더 큼.   1/2 of 12 = 6 (큼)   1/3 of 12 = 4 (중간)   1/4 of 12 = 3 (작음) 🔍 직관: 적게 나누면 한 조각이 큼, 많이 나누면 작아짐. 흔한 실수: 분모가 크면 답도 크다고 생각 — 실제는 반대.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 문장제 전략 — 'of'를 ÷로 변환
learn.content: 단어 신호 'of'는 단위분수 문장제에서 나눗셈 신호.   '24의 1/3' → 24 ÷ 3 = 8   '20의 1/5' → 20 ÷ 5 = 4 🔍 검산: 답 × b = 원래 N? 흔한 실수 (M04): 분모를 곱함 (24×3=72) — 'of'는 곱이 아니라 나눗셈.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.8 'Find Part of a Group Using Unit Fractions' pp.341-344
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

vertical_alignment.current: G3 — 단위분수로 그룹의 일부 찾기: 1/b of N = N÷b (3.NF.A.1)
vertical_alignment.successor: G3 U8 L9 — 부분으로 전체 그룹 찾기 (3.NF.A.1)
